title: Allison McVey | Immigration Attorney | Colombo & Hurd
content:
Request A Consultation
Allison McVey is a Senior Immigration Attorney at Colombo & Hurd, where her practice centers on employment-based petitions, including EB-1A extraordinary ability visas, EB-2 National Interest Waivers (NIWs), and O-1 non-immigrant matters, for extraordinary and high-skilled professionals.
Ms. McVey decided to pursue immigration law with a conviction that immigrants are fundamental to the prosperity and cultural vitality of the United States. That belief drives how she builds cases and how she engages and advocates for clients.
Before joining Colombo & Hurd, she strengthened her petition practice at other immigration law firms. Her background also includes  Social Security disability law, where she learned to navigate complex systems and to advocate effectively on behalf of her clients.

## Knowledge & Experience
- J.D., Syracuse University College of Law
- B.A. in English and Textual Studies, Syracuse University College of Arts and Sciences (summa cum laude)
- New York State Bar Association
Ms. McVey is the first attorney in her family, a distinction she carries with pride. Outside of her practice, she is an avid traveler and has volunteered at schools in Thailand and Italy.
